title: Make Transportation Authorities Accountable and Transparent Act
short_title: Make Transportation Authorities Accountable and Transparent Act
stage_label: Referred to the Subcommittee on Highways and Transit.
crs_summary: Make Transportation Authorities Accountable and Transparent Act This bill directs the Office of Inspector General of the Department of Transportation to conduct an audit of public transportation spending under certain laws (including specified coronavirus relief laws) and report to Congress.
last_action_text: Referred to the Subcommittee on Highways and Transit.
